__fixture_tag__: VENDORED SOURCE SNAPSHOT — frozen citation, not live data

claim.property: TTT (Time-Temperature-Transformation) diagram landmarks for AISI 1080 eutectoid steel (0.8 wt% C)
claim.condition: isothermal transformation from austenite at 727 C; Bain & Davenport 1930 / ASM vol. 4 framework

source.secondary: Bain E.C. & Davenport E.S. (1930) Trans. AIME 90, 117 — original isothermal transformation (TTT) diagram
source.citation: ASM Handbook vol. 4 — AISI 1080 TTT: nose ~ 550 C, bainite onset ~ 540 C, Ms ~ 250 C (literature spread 220-260 C)

tolerance.basis: ASM TTT landmark spread: nose +/- 25 C, bainite onset +/- 25 C; Ms +/- 35 C reflecting published Ms range 215-260 C for AISI 1080

spec_doc.line_hint: §5.1 ASCII TTT diagram + §5.2 phase descriptions: nose ~ 550 C; bainite 250-540 C; Ms = 220 C
